bead.title: Visibility 6: ddx agent route-status command
bead.description:
Add a new DDx CLI subcommand `ddx agent route-status`. Mirrors ddx-agent's `cmdRouteStatus`. Shows: current routing state, recent routing decisions (which provider was selected for which model-ref and why), health cooldowns currently in effect. Uses whatever public API ddx-agent exposes for its own route-status command — if the API is internal, file an upstream bead on ddx-agent to expose it before implementing the DDx wrapper.

Implementation lives in cli/cmd/agent_route_status.go. Uses the Go package, not shell-out.
bead.acceptance: (1) `ddx agent route-status` output matches `ddx-agent route-status` output. (2) Shows current route table, recent decisions, active health cooldowns. (3) Uses Go package imports only. (4) `go build ./...` passes. (5) Manual: compare side-by-side with `ddx-agent route-status`.
